steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Lines r and s are parallel and cut by transversal t. The angle marked $x^{\circ}$ and the $21^{\circ}$ angle are in matching positions at the two intersections, so they are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Apply the parallel-line relationship
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal across parallel lines are congruent, so $$x^{\circ}=21^{\circ}.$$ Therefore, $x=21$.
